75319.subject: The Cool Breeze Cost Billions
75319.body:
----------
_**Your Weekly Deep Dive into The World of Crypto**_

**July 1, 2026 · ****5 Min Read**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8283728d-5286-4743-b8a9-97601fe58c82/image.png?t=1782886205)
Caption: ** **~**As of July 1**~_~**  |  **~_~**BTC Price **~_~** |  **~_~**YTD Return **~_~** |  **~_~**Fear & Greed **~_~** |  **~_~**ETF Flows (Weekly) **~_** **_

## 📡** THIS WEEK IN CRYPTO**

**GM, Readers!**

A week ago, the $60K floor was consensus. This week it cracked. $1.26B in longs got cremated on a single inflation print, and $8.6B in Bitcoin options expired worthless. The CEO of the largest US exchange called it a "cool breeze."

Bitcoin opened the week at $64,242, printed $58,000 on hot PCE, and limped into the weekend at $59,940. ETFs bled seven straight sessions. BlackRock shuffled over $810M to Coinbase Prime in three days. 

_**Let’s get into it...**_


----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6c53930f-b4d7-4e7d-baee-6a88bb56a6da/image.png?t=1781097813)
Caption: 

----------
# 🐋 THE BIG WHALE MOVES

### **1. PCE Day: $1.26 Billion in Longs, Cremated**

On Thursday, June 25, the[ BEA reported](https://www.bea.gov/data/personal-consumption-expenditures-price-index) May headline PCE at 4.1%, the hottest since April 2023. Bitcoin was at $61,800. Within an hour, $58,000. CoinGlass clocked $1.26B in[ liquidations](https://www.coinglass.com/liquidations) across 209,000+ traders, with $450M in longs torched in a single hour.

_**Longs walked in confident. Walked out as collateral.**_

_**“Meanwhile**__, the_[ ETH/BTC ratio](https://www.tradingview.com/symbols/ETHBTC/)_ quietly hit a 10-month low near 0.027 (at the time of writing). __**The Math - 1 BTC now buys about 37 ETH (1 ÷ 0.027 = 37.04). It’s down over 35% from the August 2025 peak.”**_

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/308a228a-1fe0-4d9e-9fa8-d83172d40ca1/image.jpeg?t=1782886004)
Caption: _**PCE Day liquidation breakdown | June 25, 2026**_

### **2. The $10.6B Options Bonfire**

Friday's quarterly Bitcoin options expiry on[ Deribit](https://www.deribit.com/) was the largest of 2026, with $10.6B in open interest. Roughly $8.6B (80%) expired out of the money on June 26. Max pain sat at $74,000. Spot was around $60,000. Max pain pulled nothing.

The bigger story is the gamma flip. Below $68,000, dealers sat in negative gamma, so their hedging amplified moves rather than dampening them. Every red candle made them sell.

_**When max pain stops working, the structure underneath you changes.**_

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8a04cff5-46b3-4da5-bd57-8b39282a61a7/image.jpeg?t=1782886038)
Caption: _Options expiry positionin

75318.subject: Webinar Tomorrow: How to Invest Pre-IPO With Your IRA
75318.body:
Join me for a step-by-step guide to investing with your IRA or 401(k) funds

IRA Webinar (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VXcYF_8ffHWgW1M8wLl99SQFqW2F3lfm5QZDBqN2lhp0Y3lcq-W69sMD-6lZ3lCW5V-f7s346_WvW1Yd52X38DC6pW23Q0hT44THqVVYstKC4MQXvRW8hrWjz3x-xjrW12pkW15sLVCcW49Nk0557fxtvW6bpt6C7s18yxVX9YB92bX6_YW7m1Q0p6kd45xW7xh-Ny7CQC1tW89gkVp3PFfY8V51YR95WzWcxW97gSnK3cd3BhW737Nkt5rgqQNW2hVqG53z24C_TmR7n8HLg66W7lvGMc12w_bSW2LZwvR4Pn5QqW7lX3F78z9MQZf4mWVRR04 )

Hi Oleg,

There’s $18.2 trillion sitting in U.S. IRAs. And yet, most of it never touches private markets.¹

Not because investors aren't interested, but because they're not sure where to start.

If that's where you are, tomorrow's session is for you.

Join me at 2:00 PM ET / 11:00 AM PT this Thursday, July 2, for a live, step-by-step walkthrough on using a self-directed IRA to invest in pre-IPO opportunities through StartEngine.²

We’ll discuss:

- Pre-IPO in 2026: Why 86% of wealth managers are increasing their private allocation.³
- The 50/30/20 Portfolio: Why BlackRock’s Larry Fink is advocating for a new standard.⁴
- Potential Tax Advantages: How gains can be tax-deferred or potentially tax-free.⁵
- Setting Up Your Account: From rolling over funds to browsing opportunities.

More than 800 investors have opened StartEngine IRA accounts, putting over $17 million to work in pre-IPO opportunities for companies like Anthropic, OpenAI, and Stripe.²

There’s still time to register if you’re ready to learn more.

Register Here
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VXcYF_8ffHWgW1M8wLl99SQFqW2F3lfm5QZDBqN2lhp0Y3lcq-W69sMD-6lZ3lCW5V-f7s346_WvW1Yd52X38DC6pW23Q0hT44THqVVYstKC4MQXvRW8hrWjz3x-xjrW12pkW15sLVCcW49Nk0557fxtvW6bpt6C7s18yxVX9YB92bX6_YW7m1Q0p6kd45xW7xh-Ny7CQC1tW89gkVp3PFfY8V51YR95WzWcxW97gSnK3cd3BhW737Nkt5rgqQNW2hVqG53z24C_TmR7n8HLg66W7lvGMc12w_bSW2LZwvR4Pn5QqW7lX3F78z9MQZf4mWVRR04 )

Equity Trust Company is the custodian of StartEngine IRAs. StartEngine Crowdfunding, Inc. covers IRA account fees if you invest $20,000 or more per year; otherwise, you are responsible for all applicable fees annually. See IRA Fees (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VXcYF_8ffHWgW1M8wLl99SQFqW2F3lfm5QZDBqN2lhp2q3lcq-W95jsWP6lZ3pKW91DDC24QPXZcW13kGhn6jjNqgW8HVR5x6dknZDW7sYnSG5mbKCWW1qTSJY8ryScTW4JPQSq9knYr2W2TqmB_3QQ0LRN5cRfkx1vhgBW1QvLh41sLSD3N6dGBLSJ7R5sW57f_mf6rkHT6W5ZFXw-2yls7rW6dwsQq2MpGgPW93VXbL2D9StnW5MdH_l8pTDrjN68D25sL7HwdW8FW4008C0210W15LTt08f6h2pW3CjzLM19l9rXN2pxhGSwn85dW7rHJdF5y0f29W70sBKg3RFSsHW6GBCR38zJ0tgW6NW-3k59Yx2nW2CQDzv2ZrY0tVS7lkX48ptNfW6_1yz43_7G-6VMF-RL716Nh8W3FTkl38nqHV2W2FqYHc5Y9s6Rf61TjKx04 ) and footnote 1 for more details.

Best,

James Munro

Senior Private Equity Associate

StartEngine

This webinar is being presented by StartEngine Primary LLC (“SE Primary”), a broker-dealer registered with the SEC and FINRA / SIPC. Investments in offerings on StartEngine are speculative, illiquid, and

75304.subject: POZVÁNKA
75304.body:
Dobrý deň naši snúbenci,

rada by som Vás pozvala na osobné stretnutie pred Vašou svadobnou 
hostinou, ktorá sa bude konať u nás na Bukovine.
Rada by som s Vami prebrala detaily svadby, stretnutie, kde bude 
prítomná už aj moja koordinátorka spravidla trvá cca 1,5 hodinky, prosím 
pripravte si dostatočné časové okno.
Vedeli by ste nám dať časový nástrel stretnutia, aby sme spoločne našli 
prienik v kalendároch?
Sme na Bukovine viac menej denne od cca 8.00 do 16.30 hod.

Ďakujem!
S pozdravom
-- 

Mgr. Michaela Bilá

Head manager Bukovina

+421908 849 791

www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]



Links:
------
[1] http://www.bukovinakosice.sk

associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE

Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/3984b4dc7231193fbaf225b40bf3c09d4fbaa2ff/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.

75208.subject: Quick Hello from Runable!
75208.body:
Hi,

I'm Abhijeet from team Runable. You're one of our most active users, and I
wanted to reach out personally.

We're looking to feature a few people from our community, and before
anything, I'd just love to connect and hear about your experience, what's
working for you, what's getting in your way, and how Runable has been for
you so far.

Would you be open to a quick chat? Please select your preferred time slot:
https://calendly.com/abhijeet-runable/30min

Thanks for being with us,

Abhijeet
Team Runable

75191.subject: Cenová po(sh)nuka
75191.body:
Zdravím Ruslana a Oleh ! 💍🤍

Podarilo sa nám sfinalizovať cenovú ponuku na výzdobu.

Cenová ponuka je samozrejme kostra - ak budete chcieť niečo ubrať alebo
pridať, samozrejme zmeny doladíme, pretože ste neposlali žiadne obrázky k
výzdobe, tak sme išli len podľa toho čo sme sa rozprávali..
Radi si prejdeme všetko. Sme otvorení konštruktívnej kritike aj úprimnému
názoru, takže sa nebojíme slov "toto nechcem" alebo "toto sa nám nepáči",
pretože dizajn je veľmi subjektívny pocit. 😊🙏 Nenaceňovali sme obrad,
pretože nevieme ešte čo budeme a kde robiť. :)

Podávam kontakt aj na grafičku.
V prípade záujmu o svadobné oznámania či pozvánky a iné tlačoviny ako
etikety, nálepky a podobne, naša grafička z Dekami.creativ Vám je k
dispozícií, stačí ju kontaktovať, ona už o Vás bude vedieť. Ona bude
samostatne naceňovať tlačoviny (menu, zasadací poriadok...). 😊 Katarína
Nagyová -nagyovakatarina11@gmail.com
www.dekami.sk

Budeme sa tešiť na Vašu spätnú väzbu! 🩷

S pozdravom

Lenka

-- 
S pozdravom

Ing. Lenka Gattiker, MBA
Vaša osobná posh asistentka

Svadobná Agentúra PoshPosh

www.poshposh.sk
